body:
piercedorchidz:

˖⭒ ࣪ ๋ starting to realise how much I enjoy it when dynamics get blurred and we’re both telling each other what to do and what we want. Both giving and taking, receiving, grabbing at each other and holding and hurting lovingly. Both of us being guided by the other and in charge during the same session, all while whispering words of passionate desire ๋ ࣪⭒˖
